name: Fig & Cherry Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip off the stems of the figs and cut them into small pieces.
2. In a pudding dish, combine the figs, cherries, and their syrup.
3. Mix together the cinnamon, cake flour, and sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the dry mixture into the fruit mixture.
5. Melt the butter and stir it into the fruit as well.
6. Make half of your favorite biscuit recipe or use biscuit mix. Add 1 tablespoon sugar, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, and 3 tablespoons more milk than the recipe calls for.
7. Drop small pieces of biscuit dough onto the fruit.
8. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 6 minutes.
9. Lower the heat to moderate (350°F) and bake for about 20 minutes or until the cobbler is bubbly and the biscuits are thoroughly cooked.
10. Serve warm, topped with milk or cream flavored with cinnamon, vanilla, and sweetened generously. Serves 5 or 6.
